description:
Configure an Email Notification Profile in OpManager to integrate with a legacy ITSM system. Create an Email Notification Profile named 'ITSM-Email-Connector' that triggers on 'Critical' severity alarms for 'All Devices'. Set the recipient (To) address to 'parser@itsm.internal'.

The legacy parser requires EXACT formatting. The Email Subject must be exactly:
[NOC-ALERT] $severity on $displayName

The Email Message Body must contain exactly these 5 lines (using OpManager's dynamic variables):
Request-Type: Incident
Host: $displayName
IP-Address: $deviceIp
Event-Detail: $alarmMessage
Time-Logged: $strModTime

Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Notification Profiles to create this. Application: http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123). A copy of this specification is also available on the desktop.
